General.Name: Ordissimo
General.Description: Ordissimo SA engages in the design, development, and marketing of technological solutions for laptops and desktops, tablets, and smartphones in France, Germany, Belgium, Switzerland, and internationally. It also offers printers; and accessories, such as hard drives, mouse products, protective covers flip covers for smartphones, and screen cleaners for PC and smartphone. Ordissimo SA was founded in 2002 and is based in Montrouge, France.

1.Name: Mr. Christophe Berly de Buigne
1.Title: Director of Sales & Marketing and Director
